summary: Regression of the iteration-1 seed blocker: fully resolved. Coach user (id=6) now owns all 3 seeded activities (coach_id=6), and student (id=7) is enrolled in 2 activities. All coach mutation endpoints (materials youtube, parent-summary, assessments, events, certificate generate + PDF download) succeed against seeded activity_id=1. Student practice-log submission succeeds and auto-generates a parent summary. UI verified: coach dashboard shows Assigned squads=3 / Roster members=2 / Avg skill 90 / Parent updates=5 with full sidebar (Roster/Materials/Summaries/Assessments/Events/Certificates); student dashboard shows Enrolled tracks=2 / Practice hours=3.2 and the Practice tab renders the activity dropdown, submit button, and the freshly created practice log with generated parent summary. Certificate PDF still returns valid application/pdf (3238 bytes, %PDF magic). Health flags remain database_mode=sqlite-demo, summary_mode=local-demo, storage_mode=local-demo. No new blockers.
passed: POST /api/auth/login for coach and student returns token; coach.id=6 owns activities 1/2/3 (coach_id=6); student.id=7 enrolled in activities 1 and 2
GET /api/dashboard (coach) -> Assigned squads=3, Roster members=2, activities populated with coach_name='Jordan Lee'
GET /api/dashboard (student) -> Enrolled tracks=2, Practice hours>0, activities Basketball Elite Squad + Choir Performance Lab visible
UI: coach demo login -> coach dashboard with correct stats/sidebar (screenshot captured)
UI: student demo login -> student dashboard, Practice tab shows activity dropdown + practice-submit-button visible + freshly created log rendered with parent summary
action_items: None blocking. Optional polish: 'Sign out' button (data-testid=dashboard-logout-button) sits outside default viewport on 1365x768 and required scrolling in Playwright; consider making sidebar footer sticky or moving logout into the top bar for better discoverability.

Optional: expose activity titles as data-testid to make deeper UI assertions easier (current test relies on inner_text scan and picked up dropdown value 'Basketball Elite Squad' only after opening Practice tab).
mocked_integrations_still_in_effect: Azure Blob -> local file storage under backend/local_assets
SQL Server -> SQLite demo fallback (DATABASE_URL still unset)
